author: codex

patch.value: Hide internal test-runs-worker from default help/contracts and route it under the test execution plumbing

All-status audit 2026-07-06/07 found the live top-level help and contracts still expose test-runs-worker as a command even though its description says it is an internal background worker command. This bloats the agent-facing surface and should not count as a canonical noun or user command in pm-n7rr. Duplicate check: searched all statuses for test-runs-worker/internal worker/help surface; only closed general help/coverage items and the broad simplification epic matched, no focused item exists.

test-runs-worker is hidden from default pm --help and from default contracts summaries; an explicit internal/plumbing discovery path remains for the worker when needed by test-run orchestration; no user-facing feature is removed; contracts/completions/docs/tests are updated so the worker cannot reappear as a canonical top-level command.

message: Create focused simplification follow-up from all-status audit

value.author: codex
value.text: Creation evidence: live pm --help --json lists test-runs-worker as a top-level subcommand with description 'Internal background worker command'; pm contracts --flags-only --json also includes it in the command list. pm search --status all for test-runs-worker/internal worker/help surface found no focused open item; existing hits were broad/closed help or coverage work. This item keeps the worker reachable for orchestration but removes it from the default agent-facing command budget.

patch.value: all-status review 2026-07-06/07 found the live top-level help and contracts still expose test-runs-worker as a command even though its description says it is an internal background worker command. This bloats the agent-facing surface and should not count as a canonical noun or user command in pm-n7rr. Duplicate check: searched all statuses for test-runs-worker/internal worker/help surface; only closed general help/coverage items and the broad simplification epic matched, no focused item exists.

author: maintainer-agent
message: Graph pass #92: hiding the internal test-runs-worker belongs to the same test-execution surface the oslr SDK promotion slice reorganizes
